Game: The Great Battle V 1995-12-22T00:00:00-08:00 The Great Battle V is an Action game, developed by Sun L and published by Banpresto, which was released in Japan in 1995. <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/e15ac32b-86f5-4089-9ceb-e396f49e82c0.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/7bae434c-f87b-4409-a7ff-d3a8394ddd5d.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/941b065e-487e-47ba-baaf-5c03e38813bc.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/bc08bd86-4907-4acd-8c5b-9062b1d8932b.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/81246ef5-62f8-4443-b125-81428001f6ec.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/68a06eae-f019-4a3e-b1b5-cf2403c9c7a0.jpg Action; Platform Sun L Banpresto
